chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1034 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For dirction For hearing of CMA No.6097/2024 (C/A) 01-10-2025 Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate for the Petitoner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Farooq Ahmed Kaleri, District Food Controller, Naushahro Feroze >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Additional AG has filed compliance report of Respondent No.2 / Director Food, Sindh, which is taken on record. From perusal of the compliance report as well as the order, contempt thereof has been sought by the Petitioner, it appears that the Petitioner himself has not followed the directions of this Court and has filed the Contempt Application against those Contemnors against whom no such directions were issued. Under the circumstances, the Contempt Application is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
